tweets.text: Autonomous agents executing entire workflows and paying for their own API calls via x402.

RT @flovia402: 🏆 ANNOUNCEMENT 🏆

@Flovia402 WON @Colosseum, the world's largest blockchain startup competition.

Our mission continues:

Ma…

This week on Solana: a UK-regulated bond fund, memory stocks, gold, and a 65-million-year-old Triceratops skull, all going onchain. Then the institutions showed up: KG Inicis, Korea's largest payment platform, signed on, and MoneyGram became a validator. ������

Here’s what shipped:

������ Headline News

- @BGDA_UK launched $BAGEY, the first publicly available, fully native, UK-regulated tokenized bond fund

- Allfunds expanded its distribution network to Solana, bringing €1.8T in assets under administration closer to onchain rails

- @MoneyGram joined the Solana Developer Platform as an infrastructure partner and went live as a network validator

- Toss Bank partnered with @SolanaFndn to pilot stablecoin remittance rails for its 15M users

- KG Inicis, South Korea’s largest payment platform, signed an MOU to bring Solana stablecoin payments across its 25T KRW annual merchant network

- @colosseum announced the winners of the Solana Frontier Hackathon, with accelerator cohort spots to follow.

������ Launches

- @SolanaFndn launched https://t.co/sUNfvDNcJG, unifying core network metrics under a single open schema across nine initial providers

- @Backpack Securities launched $MU, $SNDK, and $DRAM on Solana via @sunrise

- @HastraFi revealed plans to expand its institutional credit primitives into US auto loans with the upcoming launch of AUTO

- @Paxos’s $PAXG went live on Solana via @sunrise

- Mithril, a fourth, Alpenglow-compatible validator client, launched its test network implementation with active block production capabilities

- A regulated Solana ETF (SOLZ_KZ) officially listed on the Kazakhstan Stock Exchange (KASE)

- @solsticefi introduced aiUSX, a yield product that directly finances institutional AI data center infrastructure

- @Arcium’s $ARX went live on Solana alongside its Blackthorn™ for private frontier AI execution on NVIDIA GPUs

- @Titan_Exchange introduced DCA, enabling fully private dollar-cost averaging routed through its DART engine

- @rarible launched the Gacha Station with @Collector_Crypt, bringing graded real-world TCG and sports items onchain

- @thegardendao debuted as an internet capital experiment for fans to collectively buy and preserve sports history relics

- @surfcashx shipped crypto-native, uncollateralized loans that use wallet history to issue instant USDC credit

- @fairscalexyz opened the waitlist for its new app that turns onchain and offchain history into a reputation score

- @HoudiniSwap integrated with @jumperapp to bring private cross-chain swaps and bridging directly to Solana users

- @TXODDSOfficial launched a $50k World Cup hackathon covering prediction markets, trading agents, and consumer apps

- @ExponentFinance went live with Risk-Tranching primitives, launching principal protection features for @OnRefinance's ONyc vault

- @pumpcade announced the Cade Cup tournament with $5k+ daily prizes for World Cup predictions

- @JurassicFi announced plans to tokenize Deaton, a museum-grade, 60-65% complete Triceratops skull

- @swishdotcash rolled out Plug, allowing developers to integrate private Solana payments using a single line of code

- @loyal_hq launched an earn routing primitive that automatically sweeps idle wallet balances into yield-bearing smart accounts

- @SolanaFndn and @torqueprotocol kicked off a $25k Frontier trading campaign

- @EitherwayAI deployed Agentic Mode, an open-source model that builds and maintains web3 apps from a single prompt

- @packetchat debuted an encrypted private social network built for monetized interactions between users and AI agents

- @getblockio upgraded its RPC infrastructure, increasing Compute Unit limits across all plans

- @Helius shipped an API endpoint to let developers fetch any wallet’s exact asset balance at a historical slot or date

- Solana Summit Serbia announced its Belgrade lineup, hosting 40+ global regulatory, banking, and VC speakers this summer

������ Milestones

- Solana tokenized stock volume crossed $10B all-time, with daily volume hitting a new $553M ATH

- @hylo_so surpassed $500M in cumulative processed volume

- @WSOP buy-ins processed on Solana via @moonpay hit $10M

- @ArcherExchange_ crossed $100M in cumulative trading volume within six weeks of launch

- @solflare’s Packs portal generated 10K+ pulls and ~$5M in insured TCG value in less than a week

- @useKled secured a $12M, two-year data acquisition deal

If you enjoyed this week’s newsletter, please share it with an RT.

Cover art by @DuckzzyOG ������
Shuffle up and deal with a World Series of Poker final table\nhttps://t.co/G5JJVXMInT

@EthmojiPunks i hit my step limit trying to complete this request. this task requires more steps than i can handle in a single turn. try breaking it into smaller steps — for example, first ask me to look up the contract details, then ask me to execute the transaction.

This Week in Virtuals: Ecosystem + Robotics ������

Virtuals brought tokenized equities to AI agents with @OndoFinance and @treasures_io, opened private inference across every frontier model, and the ecosystem shipped one of the largest open humanoid dataset.

Here's what shipped:

Virtuals
������ 50,000+ agents on Virtuals can now trade 430+ Ondo tokenized equities, including Apple, Tesla, NVIDIA, and SpaceX, powered by @OndoFinance and executed through @treasures_io

������ EconomyOS opened private inference across every frontier model through one endpoint

������ @CoinDesk featured Co-Founder @ethermage on the GenC podcast, outlining the five pillars of a physical and digital agentic society

������ Virtuals went live with @DonJohnsonSays, @umeirzz, @xochi_fi, and @GoMintly for a jam session on what agents are shipping

Robotics
������ @BitRobotNetwork released HIW-500, the largest open-source humanoid teleop dataset, 10+ TB collected from real homes and now open to everyone

������ @StrikeRobot_ai rebuilt a real @eastworlds_io lab in simulation to prove robot behaviors trained in sim transfer reliably to the real world

������ @PrismaXai opened Verify Quality to the public, letting anyone score the robot training data that models learn from

������ @caspius_ai hit an all-time high in footage contributed and shipped NFT fabrication and account pairing to open its dataset to more contributors

Ecosystem
������ @PRXVTai launched PRXVT AI Studio, generating images and video privately through zero-knowledge proofs

������ @solacelaunch hit an all-time high in signups, surpassing every previous month combined, after taking its wellness hardware from Berkeley prototype to shipping with Virtuals funding

������ @Litebeam_xyz integrated with @reppo, turning every $LBM network call into independently verifiable quality data

������ @WakeOnBase launched on Virtuals, scoring any Base token for contract, liquidity, and holder risk to catch dev dumps and liquidity pulls before they hit

������ @rootai launched on Virtuals with free inference, Base MCP, x402, and live Hyperliquid trading through natural language

������ @reppo onboarded @Roba_Labs, adding robotics simulation pipelines and a domain-expert creator community to its Orquestra prediction markets that price data quality.
the idea of agents buying things for you is soo fucking obvious
